title: Bing Icons
summary: Have launched a few websites, and never been able to get my icons to appear on bing/yahoo. They appear fine on Google, DDG (heavily relies on Bing), and all browsers. I have thorough (but not excessive) Metadata/schema/webmanifest, with multiple formats (ico, png, web and jpeg) and sizes (16x16, 32x32, 48x48, 180x180, 192x192, 512x512, 1200x630, etc). I do not link icons in my sitemap. I have bing webmasters set up (with actual search performance) + IndexNow, with verified rich results, and I have full menus in search (whatever it's called when your main page + 5 other pages show in one section). Bing displays one of my logo files below that. Some of these sites are 2yrs old. Fwiw, most of my projects are SvelteKit+Vite based. Still have same issue with React+Next projects. I notice that other top result sites on bing also don't have icons. Anybody else experience this? Anyone know a fix? /u/lesbiyond

title: Structured Data Issue: Price Range in Schema Markup Not Accepted by ...
summary: Currently, the schema for tickets that has a price range is not supported. title: Bug in Elementor's JSON-LD Schema: Missing "text" Field in ...
summary: When using the Accordion or FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions) widget in Elementor, the generated JSON-LD code for the FAQPage schema does not include the content of the answers in the "text" field within "acceptedAnswer." This prevents Google from correctly interpreting the responses, causing them not to appear in rich search results.
